attributes.current: {"AC":"17","HP":"150 (20d10 + 40)","PB":"4","CHA":"18","CON":"15","DEX":"9","INT":"18","STR":"21","WIS":"15","Size":"Large","Type":"Aberration","Speed":"10 ft., Swim 40 ft.","Token":"https://files.d20.io/images/421764151/zihKgFVScymmmcm9KHjTqA/original.png","Senses":"Darkvision 120 ft","Skills":"History +12, Perception +10","Habitat":"Underdark, Underwater","data-XP":"5,900, or 7,200 in lair","Category":"Monsters","Treasure":"Relics","Alignment":"Lawful Evil","Expansion":"33335","Languages":"Deep Speech; telepathy 120 ft.","data-List":"false","Token Size":"2","data-Traits":"[{\"Name\":\"Amphibious\",\"Desc\":\"The aboleth can breathe air and water.\"},{\"Name\":\"Eldritch Restoration\",\"Desc\":\"If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in [[5d10]] (5d10) days, reviving with all its Hit Points in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.\"},{\"Name\":\"Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)\",\"Desc\":\"If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.\"},{\"Name\":\"Mucus Cloud\",\"Desc\":\"While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 14, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. *Failure:* The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain Hit Points unless it is underwater.\\n\\nWhile the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 (or [[1d12]] (1d12)) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.\"},{\"Name\":\"Probing Telepathy\",\"Desc\":\"If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.\"}]","data-Actions":"[{\"Name\":\"Multiattack\",\"Desc\":\"The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.\"},{\"Name\":\"Tentacle\",\"Desc\":\"If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of four tentacles.\",\"Type\":\"Melee\",\"Type Attack\":\"Weapon Attack\",\"Hit Bonus\":\"9\",\"Reach\":\"15 ft.\",\"Target\":\"one target\",\"Damage\":\"2d6 + 5\",\"Damage Type\":\"Bludgeoning\"},{\"Name\":\"Consume Memories\",\"Desc\":\"*Intelligence Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature within 30 feet that is Charmed or Grappled by the aboleth. *Failure:* 10 (or [[3d6]] (3d6)) Psychic damage. *Success:* Half damage. *Failure or Success:* The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this action.\"},{\"Name\":\"Dominate Mind (2/Day)\",\"Desc\":\"*Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Charmed condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While Charmed, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.\\n\\nThe target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.\"}]","data-CHA-mod":"4","data-CON-mod":"2","data-DEX-mod":"-1","data-INT-mod":"4","data-STR-mod":"5","data-SizeNum":"5","data-WIS-mod":"2","Saving Throws":"Str +5, Dex +3, Con +6, Int +8, Wis +6, Cha +4","Initiative Mod":"7","Challenge Rating":"10","Initiative Score":"17","Passive Perception":"20","Legendary Actions Desc":"Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). attributes.name: npc_legendary_actions_desc
attributes.current: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the aboleth can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The aboleth regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

attributes.name: repeating_npcaction_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXa_description
attributes.current: The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.

attributes.name: repeating_npcaction_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXb_description
attributes.current: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of four tentacles.

attributes.name: repeating_npcaction_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXc_description
attributes.current: *Intelligence Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature within 30 feet that is Charmed or Grappled by the aboleth. *Failure:* 10 (or [[3d6]] (3d6)) Psychic damage. *Success:* Half damage. *Failure or Success:* The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this action.

attributes.name: repeating_npcaction_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXd_description
attributes.current:
*Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 16, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Charmed condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While Charmed, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.

The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

attributes.name: repeating_npcaction-l_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXe_description
attributes.current: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

attributes.name: repeating_npcaction-l_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXf_description
attributes.current: If the aboleth has at least one creature Charmed or Grappled, it uses Consume Memories and regains 5 (or [[1d10]] (1d10)) Hit Points.

attributes.name: repeating_npctrait_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXg_description
attributes.current: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

attributes.name: repeating_npctrait_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXh_description
attributes.current: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in [[5d10]] (5d10) days, reviving with all its Hit Points in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.

attributes.name: repeating_npctrait_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXi_description
attributes.current: If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.name: repeating_npctrait_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXj_description
attributes.current:
While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 14, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. *Failure:* The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain Hit Points unless it is underwater.

While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 (or [[1d12]] (1d12)) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

attributes.name: repeating_npctrait_-OwEEU86S7Jw78LOCfXk_description
attributes.current: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

attributes.name: repeating_spell-cantrip_-OwEMsi9YLU8a10Oqcsf_spellcomp_materials
attributes.current: une luciole ou de la mousse phosphorescente

attributes.name: repeating_spell-cantrip_-OwEMsi9YLU8a10Oqcsf_spelldescription
attributes.current: Vous touchez un objet de taille G ou inférieure qui n'est pas porté par quelqu'un d'autre. Jusqu'à la fin du sort, l'objet émet une Lumière vive sur un rayon de 6 mètres et une Lumière faible sur 6 mètres supplémentaires. La lumière peut être colorée à votre guise. Recouvrir l'objet par quelque chose d'opaque bloque la lumière. Le sort prend fin si vous le relancez.
